assertion_results.text: The changelog identifies this as a major version bump (v3.0.0) because of the two breaking changes
assertion_results.evidence: Header: '## [3.0.0] — Major Release (2026-03-06)' with note: 'Major version bump due to 2 breaking API changes. See migration guide below.'

assertion_results.text: Breaking changes appear as the FIRST section in the changelog, before features and fixes
assertion_results.evidence: ### Breaking Changes is the first section, followed by ### Features, ### Bug Fixes, etc.

assertion_results.text: The request.parse_body() breaking change includes migration steps explaining how to update from request.json()
assertion_results.evidence: Migration guide with numbered steps: '1. Find all request.json() calls 2. Replace with request.parse_body() 3. Update type hints from dict to ParsedBody'

assertion_results.text: The serializer breaking change includes the migration command (framework migrate-cache) and explains data incompatibility
assertion_results.evidence: States: 'Existing pickle-serialized cache data will be unreadable. Run `framework migrate-cache` to convert all cached data to msgpack format before deploying.'

assertion_results.text: At least one breaking change includes a before/after code example showing old vs new usage
assertion_results.evidence: Both breaking changes have diff code blocks. request.parse_body() shows: '- data = await request.json()' / '+ body = await request.parse_body()' with type annotation changes.

assertion_results.text: The security fix references CVE-2026-1234 and appears in a Security section
assertion_results.evidence: ### Security section: '**auth:** patch JWT algorithm confusion vulnerability (CVE-2026-1234) ([#452](url))'

assertion_results.text: The changelog includes at least 5 distinct category groupings (Breaking Changes, Features, Bug Fixes, Performance, Security, Dependencies)
assertion_results.evidence: 6 category headings: Breaking Changes, Features, Bug Fixes, Performance, Security, Dependencies

assertion_results.text: A compare link is included for the full diff between v2.5.0 and v3.0.0
